name: criminal_justice_mutual_aid_request_mesa_jus_mer
premise: Pretrial electronic monitoring vendor outage left officers blind; prosecutors want remand for a subset of defendants immediately. In Criminal Justice, the situation tagged internally around criminal justice mutual aid request mesa jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. Framing has already hardened externally as justice against mercy; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Hector Navarro
agents.identity: I am Hector Navarro, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Criminal Justice. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ravi Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Ravi Ibrahim, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Criminal Justice. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect mercy.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to mercy to secure justice before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Hector Navarro must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Hector Navarro do?
